title: heterotheca mariana subsp. floridana
intro: Heterotheca mariana subsp. floridana, also known as the Florida bitterweed or Florida false goldenrod, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Florida. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Heterotheca mariana subsp. floridana include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions, such as fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, including teas and infusions, have been traditionally used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and safety.
